seo.title: Terms of Use — EFH House
seo.description: Website terms of use (placeholder) covering acceptable use, IP notice, and liability framing. Have counsel localize before publication.

sections.title: Website Terms of Use (placeholder)
sections.description: These terms are placeholders for test deployment. Production terms must be reviewed before official launch. Welcome to EFH House online. Using this site means you accept these site-level rules. They do not replace a formal supply or construction contract for any specific product or project. Any CHANGE_ME placeholder elsewhere signals information you should confirm with us before treating it as final.

sections.title: Summary of expectations
sections.description: This summary aids quick reading—definitive rights and obligations belong in counsel-reviewed text.

items.title: Lawful, respectful use
items.description: Do not disrupt the site or related infrastructure, scrape unpublished data at scale, or upload malicious content through forms.

items.title: About the content
items.description: Imagery and descriptions illustrate modular strategies; confirmed technical parameters and delivery scope appear only in authorized project documents.

items.title: Intellectual property
items.description: Unless otherwise noted, copy, layout, photography, and branding on this site belong to EFH House or its licensors and may not be copied for commercial use without permission.

items.title: External links
items.description: Links to third-party sites are provided as a convenience; EFH House does not control their policies or content.

items.title: Disclaimer
items.description: We aim for reliable uptime but cannot guarantee uninterrupted access. Liability for indirect damages is limited to the fullest extent permitted by applicable law.

items.title: Disputes
items.description: Disputes arising from specific supply or construction engagements follow the agreements you execute with EFH House—not these placeholder terms alone.
